query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.service_name,
  s.service_ref,
  s.monthly_cost,
  s.monthly_revenue,
  s.supplier_name,
  s.customer_name,
  sba.billing_item_id,
  bi.description AS billing_item_description,
  bi.line_amount AS billing_item_amount,
  bi.unit_amount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.account_code,
  bi.contact_name
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.service_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.id = sba.billing_item_id
WHERE s.supplier_name LIKE '%Channel%' OR s.supplier_name LIKE '%ECN%'
ORDER BY (s.monthly_revenue - s.monthly_cost) ASC
LIMIT 15;
